## Stale-Work Review

- [ ] Parent issues with no child movement for 30 days reviewed.
- [ ] Child issues with no pull request activity for 14 days reviewed.
- [ ] Duplicate or superseded issues closed with links.
- [ ] Completed sweeps synced and closed.

## Codex Thread Protocol

- Reuse the hub Codex thread recorded in `codex-thread-map`.
- Use the hub thread to prepare daily sweep prompts and weekly comparison notes.
- Keep issue links and capacity decisions current in this issue.
